svg.title: FitMeal AI system flowchart
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from user login through Claude LLM to final frontend display, showing RAG and price comparison branches.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What user inputs does FitMeal AI collect?')
sendPrompt('What does the chat app layer do?')
sendPrompt('How does Claude act as the agent in FitMeal AI?')
sendPrompt('How does the fitness RAG system work?')
sendPrompt('How is flyer price data stored and queried?')
sendPrompt('How does the price comparison engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does Maxi price matching work?')
sendPrompt('How is the workout plan generated?')
sendPrompt('What does the final response include?')
sendPrompt('What does the frontend display show the user?')
